Poseidon Networking — Routing

Poseidon Networking supports BGP for inter-AS routing, OSPF for intra-domain routing, and static routes for fixed paths. BGP neighbours exchange AS-paths and prefix lists; OSPF flood link-state advertisements across the area. Static routes override dynamic routing tables for specific destinations. Poseidon Networking BGP neighbours exchange AS-paths and prefix lists; OSPF area boundaries flood link-state advertisements. Poseidon Networking static routes override the dynamic RIB for fixed destinations.
